summary: Partner Delivery | Mapping | Filter Search on Target and Channel List
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Partner Stream Delivery" tile on the dashboard
Then the user should see the "Mapping" Tab
And the user should see a "Search" bar display on the "Channels" and "Targets" section
When the user inputs data in the "Search" bar
Then the user should see "Channels" or "Targets" that fit the criteria is displayed
And the "Channels" or "Targets" that is currently selected/ mapped should be displayed

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Partner Stream Delivery" tile on the dashboard
